name: squeeze-evolve
description: Squeeze-Evolve: verifier-free evolutionary test-time scaling with diversity-based multi-model routing. Adds /squeeze-evolve:ask.

plugins.name: squeeze-evolve
plugins.description: Evolve a better answer to any query: sample N candidates from the strong model, then route group recombination by answer-diversity (consensus = free, low = haiku, medium = sonnet, high = opus) and synthesize a final answer with a per-loop diversity/routing trace.
